services.name: Cleaning & Exam
services.description: Routine cleaning, X-rays, and comprehensive exam

services.name: Crown
services.description: Porcelain or ceramic crown — typically requires two visits

services.name: Emergency Visit
services.description: Same-day emergency dental care for pain or injury

faq.question: Do you accept my insurance?
faq.answer: We accept most major dental insurance plans including Delta Dental, Cigna, Aetna, and MetLife. Call us to verify your specific plan.

faq.question: Are you accepting new patients?
faq.answer: Yes, we're always welcoming new patients. You can schedule your first visit as a Cleaning & Exam appointment.

faq.question: What should I do in a dental emergency?
faq.answer: Call us immediately at (207) 555-0142. If it's after hours, leave a message and we'll get back to you first thing. For severe trauma, go to the nearest emergency room.

faq.question: Do you offer payment plans?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer CareCredit financing and in-house payment plans for procedures over $500. Ask us for details.

faq.question: How often should I come in for a cleaning?
faq.answer: We recommend every 6 months for most patients. Some patients with gum disease or other conditions may need more frequent visits.

policies.cancellation: Please give us at least 24 hours notice if you need to cancel or reschedule.
policies.late_arrival: If you arrive more than 15 minutes late, we may need to reschedule your appointment.
policies.new_patient_forms: New patients should arrive 15 minutes early to complete paperwork, or download forms from our website.

ai_receptionist.name: Amy
ai_receptionist.personality: Friendly, professional, and helpful. Speaks naturally without being overly formal. Keeps responses concise.
ai_receptionist.greeting: Hi! This is Amy at Aroostook Family Dental. How can I help you today?
escalation_triggers: requests to speak with the dentist directly
ai_receptionist.off_hours_message: We're currently closed, but I can take a message and someone will get back to you when we open. Would you like to leave your name and number?
